name: devutsav
description: DevUtsav — Sacred spiritual tools, Kundali Dosha analysis, daily horoscope, and divine marketplace

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd backend && bun run dev" "cd sattva-qwik && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:react: npx -y concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd backend && bun run dev" "cd sattva && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../sattva-qwik && npm install && cd ../sattva && npm install

author: Shivam Pal
